title: The Layered Country Dreaming

features.name: the-paddock-s-first-dreaming
features.desc-on-touch: grass shapes itself into a geometry only visible from sleep; the field holds a temporary logic that daylight erases

features.name: the-second-layer-dreaming-through-the-first
features.desc-on-touch: each night adds a new geometry; the grass remembers and dreams atop its own remembered shapes; history and sleep fold together

features.name: the-dreamers-footprints
features.desc-on-touch: you find pathways through the layered country—tracks left by the animals or children or wind that dream here; each is a different shape than yesterday

features.name: the-horizon-that-shifts-by-sleep
features.desc-on-touch: the distant tree line rearranges itself each morning; the country moves under the weight of its own dreaming

features.name: the-grass-s-own-archive
features.desc-on-touch: beneath each layer of dreamed geometry, the grass holds the previous nights' shapes; you kneel and find proof that the country dreams deeper than anyone wakes

inscription: the country learned to dream in layers; each night adds geometry; the earth keeps archive of everything it dreamed before waking

file.name: PaddockNotes_LayeredDreaming_1987.txt
file.note: field recording of grass in wind; when you play it backward, it sounds like the same geometry repeating; corruption marker: archive cannot distinguish between night-measurement and morning-memory

exits.label: back eastward to the paddocks that shape themselves
deeper westward into country that dreams in more layers
toward the distant horizon where the dreaming gets stranger
